liveStreamConfig.title: Live Stream Configuration
liveStreamConfig.description: Details of the active video broadcast and standby state.

isEnabled.description: True if live video stream is currently active.

streamUrl.description: The target YouTube embed or stream URL.

title.description: The active show title or standby title.

description.description: A description of the stream content.

posterUrl.description: Fallback image URL or base64 data shown when offline.

scheduleItem.title: Schedule Item
scheduleItem.description: A single entry on the Trent TV broadcast grid.

host.description: Names of presenters hosting the segment.

description.description: A short summary of what to expect in this episode.

isRecurring.description: True if the program repeats weekly, false if it is a standalone upcoming show.

date.description: The specific YYYY-MM-DD date representation if non-recurring.

videoItem.title: Video Item
videoItem.description: An on-demand YouTube broadcast video file.

title.description: Headline title of the video report.

featured.description: Marked for homepage trending carousel if true.

aboutUsData.title: About Us Data
aboutUsData.description: Station philosophy, location, equipment, team members, and FAQs.

philosophy.description: Detailed vision of the media group.

studioLocation.description: Address of our Byron media suites.

studioEquipment.description: List of high-end camera/mic systems available.

team.description: Structured list of team member objects.

volunteerApplicant.title: Volunteer Applicant
volunteerApplicant.description: Roster applications submitted by prospective student volunteers.

role.description: Desired position (e.g., presenter, engineer, camera operator).

scheduleSettingConfig.title: Schedule Source Configuration
scheduleSettingConfig.description: Saves whether the schedule is sourced locally or via external api feed.

useExternalApi.description: True if the schedule should pull from the joint external media API feed.

/config/liveStream.description: Contains a single document setting active live-feeds.

/config/aboutUs.description: Contains static and team layout text fields.

/config/scheduleSetting.description: Determines whether the weekly television guide uses the local database or the joint student radio API.

/schedule/{scheduleId}.description: Collection of all weekly schedule entries.

/videos/{videoId}.description: Collection of on-demand Youtube highlight catalog items.
